title: Phycella gayana
taxonomy: Phycella gayana is classified within the family Pholcidae, and its scientific classification is as follows: Phycella gayana belongs to the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, class Arachnida, order Araneomorphae, and family Pholcidae. It is a species of spider that is native to South America. The Pholcidae family is a group of cave-dwelling spiders. Phycella gayana is part of the genus Phycella, which is found in South America. The classification of Phycella gayana reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its environment.
